reviews.comment: Great class with helpful tips for when you’re in the field. Several classes to chose from which makes them a great choice if you are running short on time!

reviewReply.comment:
Thanks, Lissa!  ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐    That's how we got started:  Taking care of the folks who's expiration date had sneaked up on them! 😉     It is good that we can still deliver.

If when reviewing our calendar (https://bit.ly/DualcalCCC) you are unable to find a class date/time that meets your needs, do not hesitate to contact us schedule a group or off-hour class.

reviews.comment: Very knowledgeable and was able to clear up things that were fuzzy in the online simulation videos. My instructor gave me tips and tricks in line with AHA requirements which were helpful, efficiently given, and realistic for when you're in the field.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the feedback, Emily!    I am glad we were able to help!

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4cGZmQVRnEAE

reviews.comment: The instructor was great, very animated and & easily kept the class engaged and interested throughout the training. This was my 4th time re-certifying for my BLS and have had different instructors for each. Tripp has definitely been the best so far. He included fact throughout that also weren't necessarily needed to know but aided in understanding the material, which I truly appreciated because I have always been a student that needs to know all of the whys to piece the puzzle.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for your feedback, Gayle!   You have definately given an insight to Nick's style that isn't easily relayed well on an advertisement!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Ashley!  If you ever feel you need to "refresh" your skills, please visit 910CPR.COM for a list of classes that you can crash for a quick refresh with the manikins.

reviews.comment: I needed my re Certification and Coastal was there when I needed it. They are amazing and highly recommend them. Thank you

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Deborah, for your feedback!  Pleased to know we met your expectations.

reviews.comment: Great, friendly knowledgeable instructors that made CPR re-certification fun and easy for everybody. Professional environment and super fast email response. Highly recommended.

Thank you, Ms. Bellamy!  Your review is greatly appreciated!
Thank you for your feedback, Carol.  It is especially meaningful from a fellow instructor.  Have a great summer!

Thank you, Anna!  Your feedback is very much appreciated.   Have a great summer!
Thank you, Caroline!  We appreciate you allowing us to be a part of your training. Have a great Summer.
Thank you for the feedback!  Best wishes on your new career path.  To a successful 2020!
Thank you for your input, Kathleen. Have a great summer!

reviews.comment: I needed recert fast! Multiple classes to choose from. Location ideal. Setting was professional. Instructors knowledgeable and informative. If you need classes quick this is an excellent option available in our area.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you, Patricia!  Those are all the KPIs we strive to hit.  I'm glad we were able to help.

Have a great Summer!

reviews.comment: Brian and Nick breakdown the important aspects of learning CPR and BLS technique into a relatable and easy to understand way. They were to able to answer all of my questions while providing amazing hands on experience. The classroom setting was entertaining and fun to follow! I plan to take their course again in 2 years to recertify.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Christopher!  We are glad to help.  Congrats getting into the nursing program!  Look forward to working with you on ACLS next time.
